scope: Cursor skill bridge paths for project and global installs
Cursor dry-run routing metadata for skill installs
Explicit unsupported-harness errors for agent, MCP, and guardrail installs
Cursor rules and standards projection documentation
Cursor smoke coverage with environment skip when Cursor binaries are absent
notes: Cursor agent projection to .cursor/agents/<name>.md is explicitly rejected rather than implemented.
Cursor skill bridges are symlinks to the canonical .agents/skills or ~/.agents/skills install target.
MCP and guardrail installs for cursor/opencode return structured error results before target writes.
